paper_id: Xhani - 2024 - Next Generation Cross-Sectoral Data Platform for the Agri-food Sector
input_limitations: This is a short PhD project proposal describing planned/future work rather than an implemented model. Specific ontologies to be used/designed are not named concretely, and the conceptual model of the platform is only briefly described.

models.model_label: Ontologies for semantic interoperability in the agri-food data platform

evidence_quotes.quote: This PhD project aims to address these challenges by (1) utilizing ontologies for enhancing semantic interoperability
The platform leverages ontologies to guarantee semantic interoperability.

Semantic reasoning of the food recommender system can be enhanced by the usage of ontologies by enabling ontology-based user profiles, which can help the algorithms understand user preferences, dietary needs and culinary aspects

goals.justification: The ontologies are framed as an instrument to enable semantic interoperability within the platform and to support ontology-based user profiles for the recommender system, i.e., as an enabling artifact for system implementation.

evidence_quotes.quote: The Problem Investigation phase is used to identify what is the state-of-the-art regarding existing ontologies and knowledge graphs in the agri-food domain

uncertain_goals.reason: Existing ontologies are surveyed to inform design decisions, but this is framed as background analysis rather than a concrete decision-making use of a specific model.

models.model_label: Conceptual Model of the proposed privacy-preserving data platform (Figure 1)

evidence_quotes.quote: Figure 1 illustrates the primary components of the proposed solution, which addresses our research questions in the following manner. The privacy-preserving data platform ensures that each stakeholder retains ownership of their data and can selectively permit access to it.

The Treatment Design phase is used to identify (1) requirement analysis, (2) adopting existing web technologies frameworks, (3) designing a semantic web technologies-based recommender, and (4) modeling of a reference architecture for next-gen privacy-preserving data platform.

goals.justification: The conceptual model / reference architecture is explicitly framed as guiding the design and implementation of the platform artifact, i.e., an instrument for system development.

evidence_quotes.quote: Figure 1 illustrates the primary components of the proposed solution, which addresses our research questions in the following manner.

uncertain_goals.reason: The figure serves to present the proposed solution to readers, but there is no explicit reference to using it for live meetings, stakeholder alignment, or synchronous communication between distinct groups.
